title: THE ARCHIVE EXTRACTION
description: Export the repository without Git history. Create clean archives for evidence handoff.
story_intro:
The prosecution needed the code, but not the Git history. 'Give us the files, not the secrets in the commits.'

Git archive creates clean exports - just the files, no .git folder, no history. Perfect for evidence handoff.

Time to package and deliver.

steps.instruction: Create a tar archive of the current HEAD.
steps.narrative: Package the current state into a tar file.

steps.instruction: Create a zip archive of the 'main' branch.
steps.narrative: Package for Windows users - they prefer zip.
steps.hint: Create zip archive of a branch

steps.instruction: Create an archive of only the 'src' directory.
steps.narrative: They only need the source code, not everything.

steps.instruction: Create an archive with a prefix directory 'evidence/'.
steps.narrative: Add a wrapper folder to the archive contents.
